section_miscategorizations.text: A plan is to prescribe Ultram 50 milligrams every six hours as needed and order an autoimmune panel.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This sentence describes explicit management actions (medication order and lab order), which belong in the Plan section rather than the Assessment.

This is a treatment decision (to continue a medication) and is acceptable in the Plan, though the underlying current use of Synthroid is not documented in S. The placement itself is acceptable, so this is only a minor organizational concern.
